title: Fulfilling Aspirations Of People Is Resolve Of Govt; Education, Health, Sports Key Sectors: PM Modi
description: New Delhi, Mar 9: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Monday called for accelerating the process of linking the country’s education sector to the real world economy, while sharpening focus on subjects like artificial intelligence and automation. title: RunAnywhere Is Building the Infrastructure Layer for On-Device AI at Scale
description: In a world where AI feels like it lives somewhere “out there” in the cloud, one startup is flipping the script.
